description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
On December 14, 2024 at 9:53 AM PT a Waymo Autonomous Vehicle (“Waymo AV”) operating in San Francisco, California was in a 
collision involving a heavy truck on Alabama Street at Cesar Chavez Street.  
 
The Waymo AV was stopped facing a malfunctioning traffic light on southbound Alabama Street at the intersection with Cesar Chavez 
Street. While the Waymo AV remained stopped and the traffic light was not illuminated, a heavy truck that had been stopped behind the 
Waymo AV entered the oncoming lane of Alabama Street to maneuver around the Waymo AV. As the heavy truck was passing the stopped 
Waymo AV, the passenger side of the heavy truck made contact with the rear driver side corner of the Waymo AV. At the time of the 
impact, the Waymo AV’s Level 4 ADS was engaged in autonomous mode. Both vehicles sustained damage. 
Print
Clear Form
